profile.warranty_terms: 12 months limited warranty on manufacturing defects
profile.manufacturing_ethos: Zox manufactures its helmets in Italy with a focus on lightweight carbon fiber construction and advanced aerodynamic testing.
profile.story: Zox is an Italian motorcycle helmet manufacturer that has carved out a niche in the high-performance segment, particularly known for its use of carbon fiber technology. Unlike mass-market giants, Zox positions itself as a premium brand offering cutting-edge materials at a more accessible price point than top-tier racing brands like AGV or Arai. The brand gained significant traction in the European market by combining Italian design aesthetics with rigorous safety standards, often targeting sportbike enthusiasts who demand weight reduction without compromising protection.
